subagent_contributions.load-bearer: Full downstream effects trace — 80+ call sites, 20+ test files, error hierarchy consumers
subagent_contributions.zoning-board: Convention review — 2 deviations (as any, AppFileSystem pattern), 4 matches
subagent_contributions.blueprint: Validation strategy — 12 existing pipeline-relevant tests, 12-gap matrix, bisect script
subagent_contributions.foundation: Root cause analysis — 4 high-confidence hypotheses, cache type-lie confirmed, inflight safety verified
subagent_contributions.building-inspector: 10 risks enumerated — 3 critical bugs found (span ordering, inflight TOCTOU, cache-before-truncation)

plan.summary: Verify, fix, and complete the refactored tool execution pipeline (7 named stages) so it's boring, typed, and terminal-state safe.

building_inspector_critical_findings.risk: R9 — Span annotations misattributed to parent span
building_inspector_critical_findings.fix: Move annotateToolSpan to be the OUTERMOST wrapper (wrap everything from stage 1 onward), not the innermost. Current order is backwards: annotations inside cache.ts and normalizeToolError all target the parent span because 'Tool.execute' span doesn't exist yet.

building_inspector_critical_findings.risk: R5 — Inflight removed before Deferred.done (TOCTOU gap)
building_inspector_critical_findings.fix: In cache.ts:152-164, move Deferred.done(d, exit) BEFORE the Effect.ensuring(inflight.delete). This ensures the Deferred resolves while the inflight entry still exists, preventing concurrent callers from creating duplicate computations.

building_inspector_critical_findings.risk: R7 — Cache written before truncation (poisoned cache entry)
building_inspector_critical_findings.fix: Move truncation inside the compute closure (before cache write in getOrCompute), or invalidate cache entry on truncation failure. Currently the full untruncated result is cached, and if truncation fails, the cache is poisoned.

building_inspector_critical_findings.risk: R3 — Raw Error throws bypass tapError (telemetry gap for defects)
building_inspector_critical_findings.fix: Add Effect.tapDefect inside recordToolTelemetry that writes defect telemetry, or wrap compute() with Effect.catchAllDefect and convert defects to typed errors before telemetry.
building_inspector_critical_findings.note: Deferred to fix-A (recordToolTelemetry overhaul covers this)

root_causes.hypothesis: Pipeline stages have incompatible generic constraints causing type wall (28 `as any` casts)
evidence: 12 casts in recordToolTelemetry from serviceOption pattern

root_causes.hypothesis: recordToolTelemetry uses serviceOption + Option.match instead of yield* AppFileSystem.Service — unique anti-pattern
evidence: 29 files use yield* AppFileSystem.Service — zero use serviceOption(AppFileSystem.Service)
Forces 12 `as any` casts in one function

root_causes.hypothesis: classifyError() covers only 5/10 required error kinds
evidence: Missing: output_too_large, execution_failed, internal, unavailable, dependency_missing, cache_failed

root_causes.hypothesis: P0 test gaps — timeout enforcement, retry, mutation tool caching all untested
evidence: Blueprint confirmed 12 existing tests but 3 P0 gaps

root_causes.hypothesis: Span annotations misattributed — annotateToolSpan runs last, all inner annotations target parent span
evidence: Stage 6 tapDefect annotates parent span, not 'Tool.execute'
cache.ts annotations (lines 108-150) all target parent span

fixes.description: Clean recordToolTelemetry: serviceOption → yield* AppFileSystem.Service, tap → Effect.gen, add tapDefect for defect telemetry
fixes.also_fixes: Building-inspector Risk 3 (defect telemetry gap), Risk 10 (silent AppFileSystem degradation)

fixes.description: Clean applyTimeout, normalizeToolError, annotateToolSpan return types — remove `as any` on returns
Narrow executeWithCache types — surgical `as any` removal on execute, params, key, compute, result
Expand classifyError taxonomy — add output_too_large, execution_failed, internal, unavailable, dependency_missing, cache_failed
Add P0 test: external timeout enforcement (applyTimeout stage 3)
Add P0 test: retry on transient errors (executeWithCache retry wrapping)
Add P0 test: mutation tools (cacheable:false) bypass cache
Update cache-analysis.json: mark stale remaining_debt entries, note getOrCompute resolution

**CRITICAL** Reorder span: move annotateToolSpan to outermost position (wrap stage 1, not stage 7). This ensures all inner annotations (cache hits, defects, telemetry) target the 'Tool.execute' span, not the parent span.
fixes.after_pattern: // Stage 0: annotateToolSpan wraps everything → stages 1-6 inside it

fixes.description: Fix inflight TOCTOU: move Deferred.done(d, exit) before Effect.ensuring(inflight.delete) in cache.ts getOrCompute
Fix cache-before-truncation ordering: invalidate cache entry on truncation failure, or move truncation into compute closure before cache write
fixes.before_pattern: getOrCompute caches full result → THEN truncation runs
fixes.after_pattern: Either: truncate inside compute closure (before cache write), OR: catch truncation failure and invalidate cache key

plan.apply_order_rationale: fix-I FIRST (span ordering bug — fixes all inner annotations). fix-A (biggest cleanup). fix-B (type narrowing). fix-J (inflight TOCTOU — independent of pipeline). fix-D (classifyError — pure function). fix-C (narrow types — may cascade, revert if needed). fix-K (truncation ordering). Then tests (E,F,G). Documentation last (H).
plan.rollback_plan: Revert in reverse order. Every fix independently reversible. fix-I is the riskiest structural change — if span reordering breaks existing span consumers, revert and document tradeoff.

validation_strategy.step_3_existing: bun test test/tool/tool-telemetry.test.ts test/tool/tool-define.test.ts test/tool/cache.test.ts test/tool/cache-pipeline.test.ts

ancillary_decisions.pre_existing_findings: getOrCompute resolved, inflight mutation fixed, cache-analysis.json stale
